title: Meeting Room Booking System
description: Build a no-code and AI meeting room booking system to manage schedules, room calendars, and reservations.
description_cn: 用AI + 无代码方式搭建会议室预订系统，管理预订时间、会议室日历等安排。
author: NocoBase Team
prompt: Build a NocoBase app — Meeting Room Booking System: a gantt-style room-availability board and a calendar scoped to the current user. Match the layout and signature visuals of this reference prototype: https://static-docs.nocobase.com/solution/templates/10-meeting-room-booking.html
prompt_cn: 用 NocoBase 搭建一个应用 —— 会议室预订:甘特式会议室占用看板和按当前用户过滤的日历。布局和标志性视觉参照这个原型:https://static-docs.nocobase.com/solution/templates/10-meeting-room-booking.html
featureList:
Gantt-style room-availability board
Calendar scoped to the current user
about:
meeting room booking
Operations
AI no-code app builder
internal tools
NocoBase
